title: Gun Dweller
description: This mod adds the Gun Dweller, a new horrifying threat.
body:
if you're looking for horror this is the mod for you.

this mod adds new creatures to minecraft such as the gun dweller, silly guy, and the annoying dweller. these new creatures bring a level of horror to the game which is unmatched by any other mod. 
To fight these horrifying creatures you can use the guns this mod adds.

This mod was made with mcreator so expect the highest quality slop.





this is a joke mod (obviously)
